Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Users Request Input A Python dictionary representing a DECLARE process model for a loan application review Task Add new DECLARE constraints to mitigate bias related to sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace Constraints to Add Examples given include coexistence with ManualReview for sensitive decisions response succession constraints to prevent immediate biased decisions after sensitive attribute checks and non succession constraints to block direct paths from sensitive attributes to negative decisions Output Format Updated Python dictionary plus brief rationale for each added constraint Format Requirements Must follow the exact structure of the input dictionary Unary constraints map activity to support 1 0 confidence 1 0 Binary constraints map activity to target support 1 0 confidence 1 0

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Model Activities involved StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I need to introduce bias mitigating activities constraints The prompt suggests activities like ManualReview CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck Approve Reject Approve Minority Reject Minority etc Ill standardize them to clear names CheckSensitiveAttribute BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview FinalDecision Approve FinalDecision Reject Actually to keep it simple and aligned with the prompts examples Ill use CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets define the new constraints based on the prompts suggestions Coexistence If a decision step occurs for a sensitive applicant ensure ManualReview coexists Non succession Prevent direct succession from sensitive attribute event to decision Response Succession Ensure decisions cannot immediately follow sensitive attribute checks without BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Actually DECLARE does not inherently know about demographics unless modeled as separate activities Ill stick to the prompts suggestion Approve and Reject coexist with ManualReview

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets refine the constraints to fit DECLARE semantics properly coexistence Approve with ManualReview Reject with ManualReview nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace to Reject response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: New constraints to add coexistence Approve with ManualReview Reject with ManualReview nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace with Reject existence for new activities ManualReview CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck Approve Reject

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the prompt says If a decision step occurs for a sensitive applicant eg Approve Minority or Reject Minority ensure a ManualReview activity always coexists in the trace Ill use Approve Minority and Reject Minority to be precise

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Revised constraints existence Add ManualReview CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck Approve Minority Reject Minority coexistence Approve Minority with ManualReview Reject Minority with ManualReview nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace with Reject Minority response CheckApplicantRace with BiasMitigationCheck BiasMitigationCheck with Approve Minority BiasMitigationCheck with Reject Minority

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check format Matches exactly All new activities are in existence Binary constraints are properly nested Support confidence are 1 0 as requested

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rationale needed existence for new activities Ensures these fairness enforcing steps are recognized as mandatory parts of the process coexistence for Approve Minority Reject Minority with ManualReview Guarantees that any decision for a sensitive demographic undergoes an extra human review preventing automated bias nonsuccession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject Minority Explicitly blocks the direct path from identifying a sensitive attribute to a rejection forcing a pause intermediate step response constraints Force BiasMitigationCheck to occur after CheckApplicantRace and force a final decision only after that check ensuring systematic fairness evaluation before any outcome

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This covers all instructions I will format the output as requested Python code first then rationale

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Should I add RespondedExistence or others Not necessary

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait nonsuccession in DECLARE means if A occurs B cannot immediately follow Thats correct coexistence means A occurs iff B occurs Correct response means if A occurs B must occur later Correct
